qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Environment proxy targets bypass allow-net checks for fetch()
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory is about node:crypto Cipheriv finalization behavior in Deno's ext/node crypto layer. This finding targets ext/fetch permission enforcement and environment proxy dialing, which is a different component and root cause.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory concerns Deno node:crypto Cipheriv finalization, while the only final qualifying finding concerns fetch proxy permission enforcement.
evidence: The advisory summary and PoC are specific to node:crypto createCipheriv(...).final() leaving a Cipheriv usable after finalization.
env_proxy_allow_net_bypass cites repo/ext/fetch/lib.rs and repo/ext/fetch/proxy.rs and exploits fetch() permission checking versus environment proxy dialing, not ext/node crypto behavior.
A session-wide search for node:crypto, createCipheriv, Cipheriv, cipher.final, CVE-2026-22863, and GHSA-5379-f5hf-w38v found no qualifying finding tied to the advisory root cause.
